CreateRemoteThread.description: Creates a thread in a remote process -- primary mechanism for classic DLL injection and shellcode injection into foreign processes.

CreateRemoteThreadEx.description: Extended variant of CreateRemoteThread; allows specifying a processor group for the injected thread.

NtCreateThreadEx.description: Native NT API to create a remote thread; bypasses user-mode hooks on CreateRemoteThread.

RtlCreateUserThread.description: Undocumented NT function used to create threads in remote processes; used by Cobalt Strike and BADHATCH.

QueueUserAPC.description: Queues an APC to a remote thread -- used for APC injection and Early Bird injection into suspended processes.

NtQueueApcThread.description: Native NT APC queuing API; bypasses hooks on QueueUserAPC for stealthier APC injection.

NtQueueApcThreadEx.description: Extended native APC queuing API introduced in Windows 8; used for user-mode APC injection variants.

SetThreadContext.description: Overwrites the register context of a suspended thread -- redirects execution to injected shellcode. Core primitive of thread hijacking and Process Hollowing.

NtUnmapViewOfSection.description: Unmaps the legitimate image from a hollowed process before writing a malicious PE -- core step of Process Hollowing.

ZwUnmapViewOfSection.description: Alias for NtUnmapViewOfSection at the syscall level; used interchangeably in Process Hollowing implementations.

SetWindowsHookEx.description: Installs a global Windows hook -- injects a DLL into all processes handling the specified message type.

NtWriteVirtualMemory.description: Native NT equivalent of WriteProcessMemory; bypasses user-mode hooks for stealthier remote memory writes.

NtCreateTransaction.description: Creates an NTFS transaction -- first step of Process Doppelgänging. Used to write a malicious PE to a transacted file that is never committed to disk.

NtCreateProcessEx.description: Creates a process from a section object backed by a transacted file -- core step of Process Doppelgänging, avoids NtUnmapViewOfSection monitored in Process Hollowing.

NtRollbackTransaction.description: Rolls back the NTFS transaction after creating the process section -- removes the malicious file from disk while the process continues executing from the transacted image.

VirtualAllocEx.description: Allocates memory in a remote process; meaningful only combined with WriteProcessMemory and a thread creation API.

VirtualAlloc.description: Allocates executable memory locally; meaningful only combined with VirtualProtect and CreateThread for local shellcode execution.

VirtualProtect.description: Changes memory protection flags; meaningful only combined with VirtualAlloc and CreateThread for making shellcode executable.

VirtualProtectEx.description: Changes memory protection in a remote process; meaningful only combined with WriteProcessMemory.

WriteProcessMemory.description: Writes into a remote process memory space; meaningful only combined with VirtualAllocEx and a thread creation API.

ReadProcessMemory.description: Reads from a remote process memory; meaningful only combined with WriteProcessMemory for process memory manipulation.

OpenProcess.description: Opens a handle to a remote process; precondition for all remote injection techniques.

OpenThread.description: Opens a handle to a remote thread; precondition for thread hijacking via SuspendThread + SetThreadContext.

SuspendThread.description: Suspends a remote thread; first step of thread execution hijacking before SetThreadContext.

ResumeThread.description: Resumes a suspended remote thread; final step in thread hijacking and Early Bird APC injection.

GetThreadContext.description: Retrieves the register context of a thread; used in thread hijacking to read EIP/RIP before overwriting.

NtCreateSection.description: Creates a shared memory section; used in section-based injection as an alternative to VirtualAllocEx.

NtMapViewOfSection.description: Maps a section into a remote process; combined with NtCreateSection for stealthy allocation-free injection.

NtAllocateVirtualMemory.description: Native NT equivalent of VirtualAllocEx; meaningful only combined with NtWriteVirtualMemory and a thread creation API.

CreateProcess.description: Creates a new process; meaningful only combined with NtUnmapViewOfSection -- required to start a suspended host process for hollowing.

CreateProcessA.description: ANSI variant of CreateProcess; meaningful only combined with NtUnmapViewOfSection for Process Hollowing.

CreateProcessW.description: Unicode variant of CreateProcess; meaningful only combined with NtUnmapViewOfSection for Process Hollowing.

LoadLibraryA.description: Loads a DLL into the current process; meaningful only combined with WriteProcessMemory and CreateRemoteThread for classic DLL injection.

LoadLibraryW.description: Unicode variant of LoadLibraryA; meaningful only combined with WriteProcessMemory and CreateRemoteThread for classic DLL injection.

CreateThread.description: Creates a local thread; meaningful only combined with VirtualAlloc and VirtualProtect for local shellcode execution.

CreateFiber.description: Creates a fiber for shellcode execution; meaningful only combined with VirtualAlloc -- used to execute shellcode through fiber scheduling.

ConvertThreadToFiber.description: Converts a thread to a fiber; prerequisite for CreateFiber-based shellcode execution.

CreateThreadpoolWait.description: Creates a threadpool wait object; meaningful only combined with VirtualAlloc -- used to execute shellcode via threadpool callback.

SendMessage.description: Sends a window message; meaningful only combined with FindWindow and VirtualAllocEx -- used in ListPlanting to copy payload 2 bytes at a time via LVM_SETITEMPOSITION.

PostMessage.description: Posts a window message asynchronously; meaningful only combined with FindWindow and VirtualAllocEx -- used in ListPlanting as an alternative to WriteProcessMemory.

FindWindow.description: Finds a top-level window by class name; meaningful only combined with SendMessage and VirtualAllocEx -- used in ListPlanting to locate the SysListView32 control of the target process.

EnumChildWindows.description: Enumerates child windows; meaningful only combined with SendMessage and VirtualAllocEx -- used in ListPlanting to locate the SysListView32 child window of the target process.

explorer.exe.description: Common injection target; malware frequently injects into explorer.exe to blend with normal user activity.

svchost.exe.description: Common injection target; injecting into svchost.exe allows malicious code to run under a trusted Windows service host.

lsass.exe.description: High-value injection target; injecting into lsass.exe allows credential access and persistence in the authentication subsystem.

iexplore.exe.description: Common browser injection target used to proxy C2 traffic through a trusted process.

notepad.exe.description: Commonly used as a benign host process for shellcode injection in malware samples and offensive tools.

rundll32.exe.description: Frequently used as injection host to execute malicious DLLs under a signed Windows binary.

wermgr.exe.description: Windows Error Reporting process used as injection target by TrickBot and other malware families.

msbuild.exe.description: Legitimate .NET build tool used as injection host to execute malicious assemblies.

\\Device\\PhysicalMemory.description: Physical memory device path; direct access used for kernel-level injection bypassing user-mode APIs.

SysListView32.description: ListView control class name targeted in ListPlanting injection; its presence as a string suggests the binary searches for this window class in a remote process.

NtCreateSection.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; its presence as a string indicates section-based injection bypassing the IAT.

NtMapViewOfSection.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; paired with NtCreateSection for allocation-free remote injection.

NtUnmapViewOfSection.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; used in Process Hollowing to unmap the legitimate image before writing a malicious PE.

NtQueueApcThread.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; native APC queuing bypassing Win32 QueueUserAPC hooks.

NtQueueApcThreadEx.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; extended native APC variant introduced in Windows 8.

RtlCreateUserThread.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; used to create threads in remote processes, bypassing CreateRemoteThread hooks.

NtCreateThreadEx.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; native thread creation in a remote process, bypassing user-mode hooks.

NtAllocateVirtualMemory.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; native equivalent of VirtualAllocEx, bypassing user-mode hooks.

NtWriteVirtualMemory.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; native equivalent of WriteProcessMemory, bypassing user-mode hooks.

ZwUnmapViewOfSection.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; alias for NtUnmapViewOfSection used interchangeably in Process Hollowing.

NtCreateTransaction.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; first step of Process Doppelgaenging.

NtCreateProcessEx.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; creates a process from a transacted section in Process Doppelgaenging.

NtRollbackTransaction.description: ntdll export name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; rolls back the transacted file after process creation in Process Doppelgaenging.

WriteProcessMemory.description: API name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; writes into a remote process memory space -- core primitive of DLL injection and Process Hollowing.

VirtualAllocEx.description: API name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; allocates memory in a remote process -- precondition for classic DLL and shellcode injection.

QueueUserAPC.description: API name resolved via GetProcAddress at runtime; used for APC injection and Early Bird injection into suspended processes.

FindWindowA.description: ANSI variant of FindWindow; its presence as a string indicates dynamic resolution for ListPlanting targeting a SysListView32 control.

SendMessageA.description: ANSI variant of SendMessage; used in ListPlanting to copy shellcode via LVM_SETITEMPOSITION messages.

ntdll.dll.description: ntdll module name loaded via LoadLibraryA or GetModuleHandle to resolve native NT APIs at runtime, bypassing IAT-based detection.

shellcode_stub_x86.description: PUSHAD + CALL $+5 + POP EBX -- classic position-independent shellcode prologue for base address resolution.

shellcode_stub_x64.description: CALL $+5 + POP RCX + REX.W prefix -- x64 position-independent shellcode prologue for base address resolution.

process_hollowing_create_suspended.description: CREATE_SUSPENDED flag (0x4) as a DWORD argument -- passed to CreateProcess to start a suspended host process for hollowing.

pe_magic_embedded.description: MZ magic bytes -- a PE header found in executable memory outside the main image suggests in-memory PE injection or reflective loading.

tls_callback_stub.description: Common TLS callback function prologue -- TLS callbacks execute before the PE entry point and are abused to inject and run code before debuggers or security tools initialize.

combinations.name: Classic DLL injection
combinations.description: Allocates remote memory, writes payload, spawns remote thread -- canonical DLL injection pattern used by the majority of Windows malware families.

combinations.name: Classic DLL injection with OpenProcess
combinations.description: Full remote injection chain: opens target handle, allocates memory, writes payload, creates remote thread.

combinations.name: Native remote thread injection
combinations.description: NT-native DLL injection bypassing user-mode hooks on VirtualAllocEx, WriteProcessMemory, and CreateRemoteThread.

combinations.name: LoadLibrary DLL injection
combinations.description: Writes a DLL path into a remote process and uses LoadLibraryA as the thread start routine -- textbook DLL injection pattern.

combinations.name: Thread execution hijacking
combinations.description: Opens a running thread, suspends it, overwrites its instruction pointer, then resumes -- Thread Execution Hijacking (T1055.003).

combinations.name: APC injection
combinations.description: Allocates and writes shellcode into a remote process then queues an APC -- executed when the target thread enters an alertable wait.

combinations.name: Early Bird APC injection
combinations.description: Creates a suspended process, injects shellcode via APC before the main thread runs, then resumes -- executes before EDR hooks are initialized.

combinations.name: Process Hollowing
combinations.description: Creates a suspended process, unmaps its legitimate image, writes a malicious PE, then redirects the entry thread -- full Process Hollowing chain.

combinations.name: Process Hollowing (ANSI variant)
combinations.description: ANSI variant of Process Hollowing: suspends a newly created process, hollows its image, injects a malicious PE and resumes.

combinations.name: Section-based injection
combinations.description: Creates a shared section, maps it into a remote process, creates a remote thread -- allocation-free injection avoiding VirtualAllocEx.

combinations.name: Process Doppelgänging
combinations.description: Creates a TxF transaction, writes a malicious PE to a transacted file, loads it as a process section, then rolls back the transaction -- the process runs from a file that never exists on disk.

combinations.name: ListPlanting injection
combinations.description: Locates a SysListView32 window, allocates memory in the target process, copies shellcode via LVM_SETITEMPOSITION messages, then triggers execution via LVM_SORTITEMS -- avoids WriteProcessMemory.

combinations.name: Local shellcode execution
combinations.description: Allocates a RW buffer, marks it executable with VirtualProtect, then spawns a local thread -- common in loaders and droppers.

combinations.name: Fiber-based shellcode execution
combinations.description: Converts the calling thread to a fiber, creates a second fiber pointing to shellcode -- avoids CreateThread for stealthy local execution.

combinations.name: Thread hijacking (GetContext/SetContext)
combinations.description: Reads, modifies, and restores thread context around a suspend/resume cycle -- canonical thread execution hijacking primitive.

combinations.name: Local shellcode with thread
combinations.description: Allocates a local memory buffer and spawns a thread pointing to it -- minimal local shellcode execution pattern used by loaders and stagers.

combinations.name: Remote section injection with EnumChildWindows
combinations.description: Enumerates child windows and allocates memory in the target process -- ListPlanting variant using EnumChildWindows to locate SysListView32.

combinations.name: Section-based injection (no thread API)
combinations.description: Creates and maps a shared section without an explicit thread API -- the execution trigger may be a callback, APC, or existing thread.

combinations.name: Process Hollowing with ZwUnmapViewOfSection
combinations.description: Zw-variant Process Hollowing: creates a suspended process, unmaps its image, writes a malicious PE and redirects the entry thread.
